ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var unit = payload[0] --- { id: unit.Id, unitNumber: unit.Unit_Number__c, building: unit.Building__c default "", floor: unit.Floor__c default 0, areaSqm: unit.Area_SQM__c default 0, areaSqft: unit.Area_SQFT__c default 0, unitType: unit.Unit_Type__c default "", status: unit.Status__c, handoverDate: unit.Handover_Date__c, totalPrice: unit.Total_Price__c default 0, floorPlanUrl: unit.Floor_Plan_URL__c default "", paymentCompletion: unit.Payment_Completion__c default 0, projectId: unit.Demo_Project__c, projectName: unit.Demo_Project__r.Name default "", projectBrandPrimary: unit.Demo_Project__r.Brand_Primary_Color__c default "#1B4D8E", projectBrandSecondary: unit.Demo_Project__r.Brand_Secondary_Color__c default "#F5A623", ownerContactId: unit.Owner_Contact__c default "", ownerName: unit.Owner_Contact__r.Name default "" }
